name: deep-research-harness-ide
description: ARIS-inspired deep research harness and IDE UX for evidence-grounded autonomous research workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Executor/reviewer research harness with claim-level evidence audits.
interface.longDescription: Implements an ARIS-style deep-research extension that runs adversarial executor/reviewer loops, persistent research memory, deterministic report assembly, and claim-evidence assurance gates directly in the IDE.
defaultPrompt: Start Deep Research on 'topic': build hypotheses, gather sources, and produce a claim ledger with citations.
Run adversarial review on the current research draft and list unsupported claims.
Create a revision plan that maps each manuscript claim to evidence artifacts.
